name: Starting a Warband
summary: A new warband normally begins with 500 gc, must recruit at least three warriors including a leader, and keeps unspent gold in treasury.

name: Weapon and Armour Selection Limits
summary: A warrior can be armed from the appropriate equipment list with up to two close combat weapons besides the free dagger, up to two different missile weapons, and allowed armour. A brace of pistols counts as one missile weapon for this limit.

name: Experience and Advances
summary: Starting experience is recorded from the warband list; later experience can grant advances. Henchmen gain experience as a group.

name: Skill Access
summary: A hero may choose new skills only from skill lists available to that fighter type unless a special rule or campaign result grants access.

name: Required Leader
summary: A starting warband must include the leader required by its warband list.

name: Warband Rating
summary: Base implementation uses number of active warriors times five, plus accumulated experience, with fighter-specific overrides where a rule says otherwise.
